The smallest room of my life - I've been all over the world - with a bed 1.60m wide and only one bed sheet. Room size approximately 7-8 square metersNo cupboard, no refrigerator, no storage space for two suitcases - it seemed to us to be a single room that had been designated as a double room for us. There was only one seat available, room number 223.
All the other rooms were bigger. I don't know why we got this particular room, but obviously everything else was booked.
That's a major drawback. I, at 80 years old, am not going to sleep in a double bed with my wife that is only 1.60 m wide.

title: Perfect for a weekend stay in Wrocław
pos_text: Very clean rooms. An incredibly comfortable mattress to sleep on. Blackout curtains - they do not let any light through, so if you are a light sleeper, you don't have to worry. Fresh, fragrant bedding. Clean and spacious (although not large) bathroom, fully equipped - towels, cosmetics, washing gel, shampoo and a set for women (this is a huge plus!). Coffee, tea and chocolate available 24/7 downstairs in the lobby. The decor of the entire hotel is well thought out, very aesthetic, and pleasing to the eye. The location is a huge plus, right in the center of the city.
neg_text: If someone is a sensitive sleeper, it is worth asking for a room at the end of the corridor, with a window overlooking the courtyard. It was our first time at Puro and we got a room with a window facing the street, and since our stay was on a weekend, we could hear all the parties, garbage trucks, people returning from parties in the morning, and people talking in the hotel corridor at night. The price of the hotel parking lot does not encourage its use. A few steps from the hotel there is the NFM parking lot, underground, but cheaper. The prices at the bar downstairs by the hotel reception are high, not matching the room prices, and they also add a commission for up to two drinks. There was no information about this on the menu or before entering the card into the terminal. I realized it after the load. There is no fridge in the lowest standard rooms. For a short, weekend stay this place is absolutely fine.

title: Excellent hotel in the center of Wroclaw
pos_text:
Everything was great! The hotel is clean. The room was very quiet (I wrote to the hotel in advance to ask for a room with windows facing the courtyard). They checked us in quickly and very politely. The room was newly renovated, everything was very clean and tidy. The bed linen and towels are snow-white. The mattresses are high and very comfortable. Mon was of good quality.

A hair dryer with a narrow nozzle is just what you need for styling your hair. TV with Netflix and Youtube.
The curtains are absolutely super - they darken the room, so you can get a great night's sleep.
Breakfasts are fresh. There was enough of everything, even if you came towards the end of breakfast. The coffee is excellent, the juices are not powdered, they are normal. All the food was fresh.

There were a lot of guests at the hotel, mostly groups from European countries, but in the corridors and rooms there was no noise or conversations from neighbors at all.

The location of the hotel is very convenient. In the center. The Market Square is a 10-15 minute walk away.

I recommend the hotel. We liked everything!
Thanks to the team of the Campanille Prime Hotel - Wroclaw Stare Miasto. When we come to Wroclaw, we will choose this hotel again!

The room is tiny and has "tenants" in the form of ants crawling around the bathroom and the room. After reporting the issue, the room was not changed, but "cleaned". On the same day in the evening, a similar situation occurred, i.e. the "tenants" returned. We were promised a room change the next day when another room became available. The next day in the afternoon we were given a room change but this time on the noisy side facing the main street towards the center, the windows seemed to be missing, the noise and traffic seemed to be constantly open. Sleeping pillows are like flat "pancakes", so sleeping problems and neck pain are guaranteed. The breakfast was very poor and meager, and the cleanliness was questionable. The bathroom had a bathtub the size of a baby's bathtub, and there was no socket in the bathroom, so you couldn't plug in your curling iron or hairdryer. The TV cannot connect to the internet, so if you have streaming services, forget about using them.
The hotel parking lot is a joke, tight, small, and the worst part is that if you buy a space and go out into the city, you can't be sure there will be a space for you when you return. Parking is prohibited on the streets around and the city guard is often present. THE HOTEL IS A FAILURE, WE WILL DEFINITELY NEVER GO BACK THERE.

The room was nice, BUT: - one coffee for two people, - no spoon or stick to stir the coffee, - the toilet paper was transparent, not even suitable for blowing your nose, and there was nothing else, - two body towels, but what to wipe your hands with? Or where is the foot towel or rug?
- the room equipment set mentioned on the card on the door was missing, even though the cleaning staff had a supply of it (we saw it in the corridor).
- no information that the hotel is under renovation. As a guest, I came to the hotel to rest after my trip and the whole time I was listening to drilling in the walls literally next door. Additionally, as someone who struggles with migraines, it didn't help me. If there had been information about this, I would not have chosen this accommodation.
- breakfast was okay, but it's a shame that several ladies were chatting away at the reception desk, and there was no one to bring glasses or cutlery, or even clear the tables, lemon in "lemon water" also missing apparently. There was no milk for the cereal, nor for the coffee machine. You had to go around looking for the lady and ask her to do what she was paid for. Staff to be trained. We had to sit at a table that, although there were no plates left after the guests, was covered in crumbs and splashed with drink because it was the only table not as cluttered as the rest.
- very low quality meat, I'm not surprised there's so much of it left. The chairs in the dining room are all scratched up, the fabric is peeling, their glory days are behind them.

However, we only noticed this after check-in, after we were disappointed with the room. We had a room with a balcony/I booked a terrace room and discovered that there are no rooms of that type. However, if the room description mentions "terrace", we expect one to be present. We complained, but unfortunately the hotel staff showed no understanding. The only thing they say is "we have no rooms with balconies" - so why is it being advertised? We were offered the paved courtyard (with unclean seating) as a terrace.
The fact is: The photos from booking.de are not actual room photos (the photos we have included are supposed to show a "room with a king-size bed"). A complete deception!!!!!! The bed was 1.40 m wide!!
The next morning (breakfast was rather poor), we booked a different hotel in Wrocław and moved. Never again Dikul Market

title: Does not match the photos or description
neg_text:
The photos in the listing are completely different from reality. The room does not match what is advertised at all. The hotel claims to offer a king-size bed, but the bed is smaller and uncomfortable. When we asked at the front desk, we were told that the hotel does not even have the advertised bed size.

There were plumbing renovations taking place, which caused a sewage smell in our room (ground floor). There is also no soundproofing — we could clearly hear loud music from the room next door.

We felt misled and decided to change hotels. For the same price, we stayed at a higher-category hotel in a better location in the historic city center. Honestly, it wouldn’t be worth it even at half the price we paid. We do not recommend it.

title: Two banks
pos_text: Location, good breakfast
neg_text: Of the several hotels in Wrocław on the selected date, Dikul was chosen. Of course, I was guided by the photos of the rooms and I didn't even notice that there were no photos of the bathroom anywhere. Location, cleanliness in the room, breakfast ok. Unfortunately, after entering the room, consternation and surprise because the factual situation and photos are two different stories. The room was dark, as if it had come straight from the communist era, and the bathroom looked like a hospital bathroom from the communist era, the only thing missing was a white stool on metal legs. The nice lady at the reception told me that unfortunately all the rooms look like this, including the apartment offered. Yes, I think the photos were generated by AI or the owner's wishful thinking. I know there is competition on the market, etc., but I believe that honesty towards customers comes first. I suggest posting real photos of the rooms and bathrooms so that all customers can make an informed decision and not be unpleasantly surprised on the spot.

title: Is money everything?
pos_text: Overall, the hotel was nice, but not very good.
neg_text:
1. I think that for this price (I paid PLN 350 per night - I was at the hotel from 3 p.m. to 7 a.m.) parking and a swimming pool should be included in the price
2. Unfortunately, there was a party above my room until 1 a.m. The staff did not react, although the party often moved to the corridor and there was shouting and slamming of doors 😥 3. Minor shortcomings include a broken shower cabin door and the TV not being turned on via the remote control (tolerable). 😁 4. The worst part of my stay was the morning surprise during settlement. The lady at the reception asked if I had used the bar in the fridge! Since there was something there, I assumed that the hotel staff knew how to take care of the customer and it was a treat. Nothing could be further from the truth. The receptionist added up my bill and charged me over 100 PLN (she added it up on a piece of paper, without a receipt)! I guess you should also charge for toilet paper, tea, soap, etc. If you are going to engage in such "fraud", it would be worth informing the customer that what is in the fridge is paid for! 😥😥😥 Overall impression. Nice hotel, although too focused on profit! I understand that times are hard, but to this extent?

title: Wonderful hotel with a beautiful view from the window and parking!!
pos_text:
Wonderful hotel, very friendly staff, we needed to check in late in the evening and the hotel was always in touch with us.

We stayed with a child under one year old, and although the hotel provides a crib upon request, we did not need it, as the child sleeps with us. I was very pleased with the size of the bed, where the three of us fit perfectly (even taking into account that the child slept across). A pleasant bonus was also the toys that the staff prepared and left in the room in advance so that the child had something to do.

Beautiful views of the old town from the window, a large number of restaurants to suit every taste and budget in the area, and delivery directly to the hotel is also possible; the girls at the reception will pick up your order and notify you.

And of course, the most important thing for traveling by your own transport is that the hotel has parking available, which is a huge plus since the hotel is located in the very center. The price is 50 zlotys per night, which is cheaper than other hotels nearby.

We will definitely choose this hotel again if we are in Wroclaw, thank you very much!

pos_text: Overall Impression: The hotel is in an excellent location—clean and comfortable. The staff is polite.
neg_text:
Breakfast Organization: The management is extremely strange. Despite the price of 120 PLN for two (for comparison, a dinner at the nearby "Konspira" is 150 PLN), the buffet trays were almost empty. This was the case during all three days of our stay, even though we didn't arrive late and the restaurant was nearly empty.

Service in the Restaurant: While the staff politely offered, "We will bring you whatever you like," the subsequent questions about exactly how many eggs or sausages you would eat felt demeaning. Although the food was tasty, the selection was too basic and did not justify the high price.

Conclusion: The hotel itself is wonderful, but the odd management style in the restaurant spoils the overall experience. I found it tedious even to share these details, but I decided to do so since I was sent a feedback survey.

title: Not intended for couples or relaxing weekend trips.
pos_text: The proximity to the train station was advantageous – it takes about a quarter of an hour to get to the old town.
neg_text:
Events were announced via booking (after booking, mind you). I assume it's a bit louder inside the building itself, but not that the bass is thumping into the room until 1 a.m. so much that the bed vibrates. And quite honestly, I'm a good sleeper and very understanding, but... Such noise levels are unacceptable, especially given the hotel's policy of quiet hours from 10 pm to 6 am. After I asked for a discount, I was turned away rudely - according to the motto: I would have received an email and could have cancelled. My hairdryer in the room didn't work, neither did the access card to the room on Saturday, and I had to wait three-quarters of an hour at 10 pm to get into my room (no compensation was offered here either). The receptionists seemed more overwhelmed and annoyed than solution-oriented towards the guests. Keep your eyes open when choosing a job - I say this as a former hotel manager in what was then Berlin Mitte. I must commend the cleaning service. The lady was very helpful and also very friendly.

I cannot comment on breakfast and the restaurant - the bar was closed due to the parties. I hadn't booked breakfast - I wanted to have breakfast later in town.

title: Never again…
pos_text:
There was a tram stop nearby.
The bed was very comfortable and it was relatively clean.
neg_text: Hotel two days before arrival (date is early December) he sent information that they had a special occasion - a company Christmas Eve party. If I were to change the location, hotel prices at that time for such a close date cost at least PLN 500 per night (ignoring the problem of availability on weekends) - I come to Wrocław alone to study. I arrived before 10pm, tired after a full day of education. I think I spent over 20 minutes at the reception, even though I had already provided all the information on booking - invoice details, phone number, and I don't know what else the lady wrote there. I say they already have my number, she says she doesn't have a number. And the hotel called me 2 hours earlier... Typing speed slower than slow. She was supposed to send me the invoice by email right away. The music was blaring beneath me all night long, and the receptionist refused to move my room to a quieter area, even though there was a place on the opposite side of the room. At 4:30 I was woken up by the screams of a couple making love. And I don't think they were very loud at all, but the walls are very thin. A great night as before the next morning classes, waking up at 6:30. The bathroom was recently renovated, but the shower head was probably 20 years old. Hair stuck to the shower walls. But only 4. As if that wasn't enough, the hotel doesn't know how to issue invoices. I waited almost 3 weeks. There was another problem because they were supposedly issuing a correction for a week because someone made a mistake. They responded to messages with a delay of several days. And the atmosphere is a bit like the PRL. All together: a tragedy in its entirety.

title: Tolerable, although I've had better times in Wrocław.
pos_text: A hotel with very nice decor, also in the rooms. A very varied and tasty breakfast. Overall, the room was clean, and that's all there is to it.
neg_text:
Unfortunately, the passage of time is visible in this hotel. During our short stay, we found a few seemingly trivial things that effectively reduced the comfort of our stay:

- leaking shower with missing door seal. Additionally, the door is either damaged or has dropped, which is why the other seals are not closing properly. After every bath, there is just a puddle in front of the shower

- bathroom tiles moving on the floor when you step on them, or a damaged toilet seat, or rather its mounting.

- traces of mold in the shower cabin, the shower faucet is so calcified that it is difficult to set the water temperature

- bathroom fan not working, bathroom door handle loose,

- leaky window, although there are external blinds and it can be somewhat prevented from getting cold air in, but it's weak.

- a worn out bed mattress to the point that when you sleep you just sink in the middle

- no garbage can, except for a mini garbage can in the bathroom. There are tea cups and a kettle - but no spoons or anything to stir the tea with :)

The parking lot was completely icy and unpaved, as was the hotel exit. Before 8:00 a.m. the grounds were literally an ice rink. This cannot be explained by weather conditions – it is simply negligence on the part of the facility. The lack of any security measures is unacceptable and poses a real threat to guests. This situation shouldn't happen

title: For a wedding, a ball and any other event
pos_text: Very tasty food in the restaurant. I'm surprised the same team can't make a tasty breakfast. I emphasize the word "breakfast". Very helpful and friendly staff!
neg_text: It is clear that the hotel is primarily focused on event management. This is evidenced by the żurek soup served for breakfast (probably for guests "with a hangover"), as well as leftovers from dinner, i.e. meat, etc. I was looking forward to the oatmeal, but unfortunately it was always watery (more like a milk soup with oat flakes); there was no fruit, only oranges cut into wedges (with peel) were served. Bread with black cumin - a soggy dumpling that defrosted on the Swedish table. Cream cakes are also great, but for breakfast? These are probably also leftovers from the previous party. As for the rooms, the mattress has already had its day, and the bathroom shower cabin leaks, so the floor is flooded.

title: Bad
pos_text: Breakfast
neg_text: The staff was confused as if it was their first day at work. Not only did I not receive any information and there is no information anywhere that there is a surface and underground parking lot and that the prices are different, but the lady at the reception desk did not know that the underground parking lot has parking space number 10 and I was running back and forth checking because the lady kept telling me it only goes up to space number 9. The underground parking was 10 PLN more, and the lady told me it was only 10 PLN, but for example, for 10 days it would be 100 PLN, and the information on the website says 40 PLN for a passenger car and 60 PLN for a van, and here the lady charges me 50 PLN and threatens me that if there is a stain on the towel, I will have to pay 40 PLN. God, I'm afraid to touch anything in this hotel. I will definitely never use this hotel again.

title: The price corresponds to the quality. Breakfasts are phenomenal.

neg_text: On the first night I encountered an absurd and unacceptable situation in which drunk guests were making such a terrible noise that they could be heard throughout the entire floor. Only personal intervention was able to silence this riffraff.

title: Weekend stay
pos_text: The room and the hotel itself are clean and well-maintained, the breakfasts are very good and varied.
neg_text: Cumulative ventilation system on the entire floor, division of the year into heating season and cooling season and it cannot be changed (that's what I heard), meant that when the weather was nice on February 28 and almost the entire south-facing glass room was very hot from the sun, the only thing that could be done was to turn on the air conditioning in the heating mode or free air circulation, which was definitely insufficient. The impossibility of even opening the window did not allow for airing the room, so sleeping or just being in such a temperature (feel free to go up to +25 degrees) This is definitely a minus of the apartment.

title: I recommend the hotel because of its location, delicious meals and satisfactory standard of rooms.
pos_text: Good location. Breakfast included in the price is tasty and with a large selection of dishes.
neg_text: Misunderstanding regarding so-called "special wishes". I requested the possibility of reserving a parking space in the reservation form (paid parking) and I indicated that I would arrive between 2:00 p.m. and 3:00 p.m. (the hotel check-in time is 2:00 p.m.). I received a reply via email that the staff would be happy to fulfill my "special request". Upon arrival, I was informed that the hotel does not take parking reservations, and the staff stated that my "special request" was to check in at 2:00 PM (!?). I will just add that there were a dozen or so spaces in the hotel parking lot with the description - "reserved space". This is some kind of misunderstanding. But eventually a parking space was found and that is good news. But what's the point of these "special requests" if, as a rule, they are not fulfilled and regular check-in during standard hours is treated as special treatment of guests.

title: Nice hotel, but in summer!
pos_text: Very nice hotel. A big plus was the cleanliness, the swimming pool and the location, which perfectly suited my needs during my stay. I also appreciate the proximity of shops and restaurants. This is the second time I have stayed at the hotel; my previous visit took place during the summer and I rated it very highly. Unfortunately, this time I have to lower my rating.
neg_text: The room was a real sauna. Air conditioning (according to the information on the plate located next to the control panel) in winter it only works in heating mode and despite being set to the lowest possible 16°C, it only heated the already warm room, and the window in the room cannot be opened or tilted. This is quite a surprise considering the amount you have to pay per night. Unfortunately, this made it difficult to fall asleep and caused constant waking up, which significantly affected the comfort of the stay - I wanted to run away from the room. If I decide to stay again, it will only be in the summer; however, in the winter I will look for another hotel with working air conditioning.

Breakfast - a real surprise, especially at this price, everything fresh, replenished constantly, delicious chef's salad with camembert cheese and pear.

neg_text:
Several problems:
1) The room is much smaller than it appears from the photos and the bathroom, "ship service" sized, was right next to the bed and there was zero privacy.

2)The pillows provided were half-empty and incredibly uncomfortable, and there were no others in the room.
The duvets they provide are too heavy even with the air conditioning off and you end up sleeping half uncovered or sleeping in your underwear and feeling cold or in your pajamas and sweating.

3)Cleanliness needs to be reviewed, the lamp above the bathroom mirror had a layer of dust that had accumulated who knows how long ago.

4)More seriously, we stayed for three nights and they failed to clean the room every day, with the result that on the last day we had neither clean tablecloths nor toilet paper rolls.

5) the air conditioner was too powerful and even setting it to 22 degrees (the minimum) meant you were suffocating after a very short time and the lack of an opening window was a problem.

I understand that it is a conference hotel but here we don't even feel the passing grade.

The gym was very small and on the second day the door broke and we couldn't use it. The bathrobes were old, one even had a hole in it. The Wi-Fi was very poor, the TV kept freezing up, and most of the channels were German, making the hotel seem heavily geared towards German guests. The food prices were definitely exaggerated considering the quality. Unfortunately, breakfast was disappointing, with little choice, average taste and no allergen labeling. Additionally, the bathroom was not very comfortable, the toilet was very low (for a child) , and after lifting the flap it was not possible to drain the water normally. At this price and for a 4* hotel we expected a much higher standard

The bathroom is huge and spacious. The automatic water refilling machine for room carafes in the corridor also does the job.
Breakfast has a wide selection, from hotel classics to pancakes and waffles with all sorts of toppings (so even the smallest kids can eat something), as well as cakes and cookies. Room service is basically unnoticeable, while breakfast, reception and bar service are exactly as they should be.

title: I'm in Wrocław two or three times a year - I'll definitely stay there again.
pos_text:
I stayed at this hotel a few months ago. I was disgusted by the breakfast offered. A symbolic choice, stale bread - in one word, a tragedy. This time I was positively surprised: the breakfast was very tasty, the bread was fresh and there was a good selection.
As for the location (as before) I maintain that it is simply wonderful. The hotel's glory days are long gone, but the bedding is clean, the beds are comfortable, and the staff is very nice and helpful. I came back really happy. I can certainly recommend such a stay to anyone. Additionally, the restaurant of the same name honors a 10% discount based on a business card issued by the hotel - and the cuisine is excellent. The breakfast is EXCELLENT, it has VARIETY and it's FEELING. The food is excellent, and the service from the waiters, as well as the tableware used, is impeccable. The truth is, I was pleasantly surprised.

title: More pros than cons, although nothing groundbreaking.
pos_text: The facility is worth recommending, not only because of the obvious advantage of its location. At Scandic, a certain level is generally guaranteed: the good and varied breakfast was not much worse than what I know from the Scandinavian hotels of this chain, and in terms of comfort, finishing and bathroom equipment it was perhaps even better. The clever layout of the room deserves praise. An additional plus for the helpfulness of the staff - we checked in without any problems, although it was technically over an hour before the scheduled check-in time.
neg_text: The main problem: the promised soundproofing is unfortunately a lie. You can hear quite a lot from the busy Piłsudskiego Street: from accelerating cars to all possible sounds of trams (which have a stop right in front of the window) there were loud conversations and laughter of passers-by. Room decor is a more subjective thing, but I admit that the yellowish wallpaper, which looked like it hadn't been renovated in decades, put me in a rather depressing mood. Sleeping was not made easier by the pillows being too soft: to quote his wife, "to get a good night's sleep, you need pillows that you can rest your head on, not ones you sink into."

title: Good stay overall.

title: Good location, comfortable rooms, great breakfast, moderate price.

Last but not least, the breakfast was particularly good, with a wide variety of options that changed slightly from day to day.
neg_text: I cannot point to any significant drawbacks. However, as a minor note, if you are traveling with heavy luggage and plan to walk from the train station, be aware that much of the route consists of cobbled streets, which can make it difficult to roll a suitcase.

The girl at reception arrogantly said that they should prioritise cleaning the rooms needed for tourists checking in, without even apologising for the inconvenience. So if you want to take a shower or rest for an hour in the afternoon, it's better to change hotels. Cleaning only consisted of changing towels and making the bed in a cursory manner. We found the hair we left on the bathroom floor in the same place. The rooms were equipped with a coffee maker and a kettle. It's a shame that we only found the pods on the first day, from the second day onwards nothing could be done, the machines were only there for show. Breakfast left a lot to be desired. title: A stay that somehow managed to be smooth, comfortable, and unexpectedly entertaining.
pos_text:
Every hotel stay blends into the next after a while. Same rooms, same breakfasts, same “it was lovely” reviews that mean absolutely nothing.

This one didn’t.

Not because of anything dramatic. Quite the opposite. It just quietly got everything right. Check-in was smooth, the room was exactly what you want after travelling, and nothing felt like a compromise. No noise, no faff, no “why is this like this?” moments.

But the highlight? Breakfast theatre.

On our second morning, a man arrived in full hotel robe, like he’d taken a wrong turn out of a spa and decided to commit to the look. Fair enough. Except he then proceeded to pace the lobby like a minor celebrity avoiding paparazzi, surveying the room with the kind of calm authority usually reserved for people who own islands.

Nobody stopped him. Nobody questioned it. And somehow, it worked. The whole place carried on as if this was completely normal behaviour.

That moment summed the hotel up better than anything else. Comfortable enough that people relax into it, but polished enough that even a bathrobe power-walk through reception doesn’t break the atmosphere.

Beyond the unexpected entertainment, everything else delivered exactly as it should. Great location for exploring Wrocław, genuinely good breakfast, and staff who manage to be helpful without feeling scripted.

It’s rare to find somewhere that just works without trying too hard.

We’ll be back. And next time, I might bring a robe just to see how far I can push it.
neg_text: The only minor issue was the free candy at reception. A great idea, unless you arrive with children who immediately identify it as a core feature of the hotel. From that point on, leaving or entering the building required a negotiation I was rarely winning.

title: Nice hotel to stay at
pos_text: Very clean and staff were great
neg_text: Garage was a little expensive

title: A very pleasant stay overall, with outstanding breakfast and friendly service
pos_text:
I had a wonderful stay at the hotel. The breakfast was excellent—very rich, diverse, and far beyond my expectations. It offered a wide selection of high-quality food, and everything was fresh and delicious. It truly exceeded what I anticipated and made my stay even more enjoyable.
Although my room wasn’t ready before check-in, the staff kindly allowed me to leave my luggage, which I really appreciated.
neg_text: The rooms were a bit more basic than I expected, but still comfortable. The only downside for me was that bottled water is no longer provided in the rooms, and instead there is a water dispenser in the hallway.

title: Tourist stay of a married couple for one night
pos_text: Room and great breakfast
neg_text: One small note is the lack of bottled water in the room and the considerable distance from the room to the water dispenser in the corridor.

title: Excellent choice in Wroclaw
pos_text:
The hotel's room furnishings aren't exactly 5-star, although the reception area with bar and breakfast room is very nice. Adequate welcome at reception, helpful and polite staff. The breakfast was plentiful, varied, and delicious. The waiters were always available and quickly replaced any finished food.
Functional room equipped with various sets for guests.The hotel is in an excellent location for exploring the historic city center on foot, near the river where you can stroll in peace, and close to the cathedral island.
neg_text:
Shower head could be improved for a 5 star hotel.
Non-fixed but foldable bed for the child with a thick mattress. Cleaning could be improved in terms of dust.

title: as above
pos_text: Breakfast is tasty, but there are few seats. I had to come at a different time because there were too many people.
neg_text: Terrible pricing policy. I was in this hotel for the third time in a short time. Every time the same stay and the same room standard. Each time the price increases by 100 PLN. That's why this was my last stay at this hotel.

title: I expected too much from a five-star hotel, I've been to better 3-star ones.
neg_text: I was actually disappointed with breakfast. The bread was as hard as a rock (maybe it was just me), scrambled eggs made from powder were also poorly mixed, creating brown "clots". There were only some soggy, tasteless cakes to go with the coffee. The room description included a minibar, and all the rooms we stayed in had an empty refrigerator. This information should therefore be changed on the booking to avoid misleading information.

title: Quiet, comfortable city hotel
pos_text: The location is excellent. The service was very friendly. The room is large, the beds and pillows are comfortable.
neg_text:
The light in the bathroom is a bit too dim, and after showering, the bathroom is flooded because the glass panel on the bathtub doesn't seal against the wall.
A walk-in shower would be better than a bathtub.

title: Very overrated 5*, it's max 3*
pos_text: The only advantage is the location
neg_text: We do not recommend this hotel, 5* is only on the front door. Old rooms, shabby furniture, dirty walls, outdated air conditioning system, no individual heating in the bathroom, no radiator or heated floor, cold bathroom. The standard room is a much lower standard than the same rooms in other hotels in Wrocław with fewer stars. Water dispensers on every floor, too bad there wasn't sparkling water. Breakfast is a joke, poor selection, no live cooking and often present at lower standards. Dried out salads, cheeses or cold cuts. The service does not replenish if something is missing. In every other Radisson we have been to, not only in Poland, the standard was great, but here it is a maximum of 3*. There is a separate lounge for Radisson Rewards members, as well as the top two floors, also for members only. I believe that in a 5* hotel everyone should be treated like a prince, not just the chosen few. The only advantage is the location.

title: high standard and comfort
pos_text: everything is fine, very nice room
neg_text: I have no comments

title: Okay
pos_text: Breakfast is ok
neg_text: No additional amenities in the room compared to other hotels at this level (e.g. Flip-flops, vanity pack, etc.)

title: Passable
neg_text: Our room was changed three times due to a booking error: we were given one bed instead of two separate beds. After changing the room, only one bed was ready, so another change. 90s decor, old furniture. There is no panoramic view because the windows are very dirty. Breakfast was poor for a Radisson 5*

title: Amazing city people very friendly
pos_text: The location of the hotel was very good, close to attractions restaurants and bars also trams and buses to get around

title: Solid choice
pos_text:
- Electric car charger
- Directly in the city center
- Breakfast was really good
- free Sauna
neg_text:
- Parking was expensive. The charging with Noxo as well (0.59€ per kWh for 11kW AC).
- People often blocked the charging station without charging their cars
- Sauna was free of charge but the door was not opening correctly. As well as the shower door sealent was broken at the mens shower. This is not 5 star standard
- The rooms did not quite match what I expected from a 5 star Radisson hotel. Rather a 4 star hotel toom

title: Bad
neg_text: The wc was very bad there is too much hygiene problems my worst trip ever but staff is good ;)

title: Great city break, perfect location and opportunity to relax
pos_text: Cleanliness, service, breakfasts good and varied. Super comfortable beds, windows isolate street noise well.
neg_text: I would suggest placing a water dispenser in the SPA/sauna area. Or, even if it was ecological, putting bottles of mineral water like in the gym. It's a pity that the relaxation room is far from the saunas. It's difficult to stay in sync as a pair, having two separate exits through the men's and women's locker rooms, with rest after each session.

title: Everything was fine, breakfast and location were perfect.
pos_text: Breakfast location
neg_text: Empathetic copy staff. They never look you in the face

title: Good location, excellent breakfast
pos_text: Location, breakfast
neg_text: Staff, not very empathetic.

title: Recommended hotel in a top location
pos_text: Location near the river. Both special requests were fulfilled (connecting door, 2 duvets in king-size bed). The garage attached to the house is large and modern. Breakfast was very good, but the breakfast room was a bit noisy.
neg_text: Music too loud in the lobby and restaurant. Unpleasant smell in the bathroom sometimes when using water. I assume it's from old AC. It went away again after a few minutes. However, Hoteö is more like a well-run 4-star hotel than a 5-star hotel, which is fairly reflected in the price.

title: Poor restaurant management
pos_text: Good
neg_text: The restaurant is not working at all. The waiting time for dinner was 1.5 hours, while there was one completely incompetent young waiter who couldn't bring drinks in 30 minutes. Terrible experience

title: Good stay, excellent location
pos_text: Great location, decent rooms, very comfortable and spacious bed, Plastic Free Policy in place
neg_text: I stayed for two days, the room was not cleaned (room and beds were made) between one day and the next. Excessively worn bathroom towels

title: Great place! I recommend
pos_text: Delicious, varied breakfasts

title: Consistent Radisson quality with outstanding comfort and superb bedding.
pos_text: Our stay at Radisson Blu Wroclaw was exceptional. The hotel perfectly maintains the high standards of the chain - everything from the service to the facilities was top-notch. The rooms were spotless and very cozy, creating a welcoming atmosphere. A special mention goes to the bedding - the pillows and mattress were incredibly comfortable and ensured a great night's sleep. It is exactly what you expect from a premium hotel.
neg_text: The hotel is located a bit far from the main city center.

title: very good quality, cleanliness; a pleasant stay
pos_text: Favorable location, parking available.
neg_text: Not the best coffee service in the room, i.e. too little milk for coffee.

title: Very high standards of comfort and service, very impressive
pos_text:
Impeccable room and bathroom with a huge bathtub.
AMple choice for breakfast, with little variations every day so it was always a bit different.
Very attentive staff.

title: Pleasant
pos_text: Underground parking available but the price is too high,
neg_text: Insufficient bathroom equipment for a 5-star hotel

title: Great family-friendly hotel with very good food and friendly staff.
neg_text: Our room was very stylishly furnished, super comfortable and clean. Unfortunately, it was a bit warm in the room; I don't think the air conditioning was working properly.

title: All in all, it's nice. The staff can't do anything for people who don't know what a toilet brush is.
pos_text: The location is really great. I thought the water dispenser in the hallway was great.
neg_text: The toilets in the "spa" area were dirty (poor cleaning staff). The sauna is tiny and only has one normal dry sauna. Pins on the floor in the room are also difficult.

title: A very nice hotel, which is very suitable for events and serves very good food.
pos_text: Breakfast and especially dinner (Zcurek as a starter, beef roulade with small dumplings and red cabbage, dessert Creme Brûlée) were excellent! In the mornings, warm bread and regional specialties were served at breakfast. A very well-organized hotel with pleasant and courteous staff. I will come again.
neg_text: The bathroom sink showed traces of older soiling that apparently could no longer be removed.

title: We spent 2 nights there. Great location. Everything at the highest level. The stay was pure pleasure. From the very beginning
pos_text: Beautiful room, great kitchen and lovely staff.
neg_text: Nothing.

title: Fabulous!
pos_text: Clean, spacious and beautifully decorated room. 5 minutes walk from the heart of Wroclaw.

title: Prefect stay
pos_text: Price/Quality excellent! Parking available. Close to city center. Great and clean room. Nice Breakfast.
neg_text: All good !

title: The hotel is OK but I've stayed in better ones
pos_text: Very rich breakfast buffet. Everyone will find something for themselves. Gym and saunas open 24/7.
neg_text: The parking gate closes very quickly, so if you have to get out of your car to scan your ticket, the gate closes before you get in. It is very easy to damage the car this way. Very narrow parking spaces. If you have larger suitcases or a stroller, the driver must first exit the parking space so that everything can be loaded into the car.

title: Comfort, professionalism and hospitality at the highest level
pos_text:
Staying at this hotel was a pure pleasure. The check-in process was completely seamless, and the reception staff deserve a huge shout-out – they were incredibly kind, always helpful, smiling, and absolutely professional. It was clear that they were in the right place and were able to create an atmosphere in which the guest felt at ease, without unnecessary distance or looking down on them.
The entire facility is very neat and spotlessly clean, and the amenities available are of a high standard. The room was well-arranged, clean and fully equipped - from slippers and bathrobes to a complete set of toiletries in the bathroom. Everything refined down to the smallest detail.
The breakfasts were delicious, varied and regularly replenished, so everyone could find something for themselves. This stay was one of the nicest and most comfortable hotel experiences we have ever had. - we will definitely come back here again.

title: Does not meet the overall standard of the Radisson Blue chain
pos_text: For a hotel of this level - so-so. Limited selection of dishes, practically no choice of sausages, the only pleasant surprise is a set for preparing "Big Tomas".
neg_text: Climate control in the room. It's terrible - it's almost impossible to adjust the temperature - it's impossible to sleep.

title: I definitely recommend it.
pos_text: A very good hotel, which I recommend with all my heart. Polite staff, large room, very good breakfast. We were very pleased with the mattresses and pillows, which is hard to come by in hotels. Underground garage available for an additional fee. The location is fantastic - in the center, but in a quiet area. Close to everything.
neg_text: Nothing.

title: It was a successful stay.
pos_text: Comfortable room, good service at reception
neg_text: One of the two saunas was damaged (no door)

title: Nice hotel with room for improvement
pos_text: Got to try new room, was great. I have passed on a few more points for improvement.
neg_text:
The sauna could be a bit warmer, around 60 degrees now.
Breakfast could be a little more extensive.
Gym is in need of renovation.

title: A stay at the Radisson Blu Wrocław is an experience that combines elegance with pleasant, urban relaxation.
pos_text:
The rooms are spacious, comfortable and meticulously crafted with soft beds, excellent soundproofing and large windows that let in plenty of light. Breakfast? Diverse, fresh and presented in a way that makes you want to celebrate every bite.

This is a perfect place for both a romantic weekend and a business trip. Comfort, style and a great location combine to create a blend you'll want to return to.

title: Combining duties with relaxation
pos_text:
The fragrance, cosmetics and bedding smelled very nice. I had everything I needed:)
I feel relaxed after returning, even though my stay was connected with a two-day university meeting;).
I saw that one of the hotel guests had a dog with them, so the hotel is pet-friendly and eco-friendly.
The location was great - I had a window with a view of the Panorama Racławicka building.
A big plus for the friendly service, I received all the necessary information during check-in.
Breakfast buffet, very tasty and large selection.
The facility is undergoing renovation, but it wasn't particularly bothersome for me, I'm curious to see the results.
I didn't have a chance to use the spa and sauna, but I hope to come back here again:).
neg_text: I couldn't figure out how to use the water dispenser in the hallway, I guess this technology was beyond me :D

title: Price inadequate to the conditions of stay. I will consider whether to return despite the very good rating given to me previously
pos_text: Friendly service. Tasty breakfast. comfortable bed
neg_text: During breakfast, cutlery was collected from the users and the same cutlery was placed again, together with the napkins, on the table waiting for new users. Shocking. Drilling during the stay - there was no information about this on the hotel website because I probably would have found a place elsewhere - after contacting the staff and asking for 2 hours of peace and quiet, I was informed that they would try but it probably wouldn't work (it was Saturday at 2 p.m.:). The bathtub drain was clogged - I was standing knee-deep in water while taking a shower. Moreover, neither the cleanliness of the carpet nor the stained furniture are a measure of 5-star superior, are they?

title: great location, comfortable, we had a room with a bath which I thoroughly enjoyed
pos_text: we did not have breakfast in the hotel as on the previous visits, I found it overpriced and not very interesting as a food selection. Most bread products were not that fresh or nice even though Polish bakeries have amazing assortments
neg_text: breakfast pricing and bakery selection

title: Exceptional
pos_text: Literally the whole thing

title: Pleasant stay
pos_text:
The room was beautiful and the bedding comfortable.
Delicious breakfast and jacuzzi

title: I highly recommend it!
pos_text: Very nice service, clean rooms
neg_text: No objections

title: you have to know what to book, but it's definitely worth coming back ;)
pos_text: The entire stay was saved by the staff's approach - despite a misunderstanding at the booking stage, we were moved from the apartment in the "Park" part (the windows of which overlooked the street and the depot) to the outermost apartment in the actual park part of the facility, where we had a view of trees along the entire wall :)

title: Superb
pos_text: Beautiful and elegant hotel. Peace and quiet, super clean room, fresh air. View of the surrounding greenery. Very tasty coffee. Fresh linen and a mega comfortable bed.
neg_text: I missed being able to open the window. Some guests may struggle with claustrophobia and not everyone can tolerate air conditioning, especially at night. Despite the beautiful and clean bathroom, there is no shelf in the shower to place your toiletries or a hanger by the shower to hang a towel and a change of clothes. There is no socket at the desk to connect a laptop. It could be made more efficient because I had to wrestle with the cabinets to access the socket on the floor.

title: I was very disappointed with my stay at the hotel, I expected something much better from a 5-star hotel
neg_text:
Breakfast service was very unpleasant, both on the first and the next day. Lady offended at guests.
The scrambled eggs were awful, the cakes that seemed homemade were also awful, some of the mousses in jars were disgusting, a greasy, tasteless goo.
I would expect much more from a 5-star hotel.
The room is dirty and not cleaned.
The de luxe room is very dark, there is no main light source, only small lamps with dark shades are available.
Overall, the stay was not very pleasant.

title: Good
pos_text: Location, rich breakfast
neg_text: Cold jacuzzi, no room for breakfast, we had to sit outside on the terrace

title: Fantastically beautiful
pos_text: The arrival alone was like arriving in a castle. This was our third time there and everything was clean and well-maintained. Every wish was fulfilled.
neg_text: Nothing There was really nothing to complain about.

title: Beautiful hotel and facilities, but unfortunately the service and staff attitude were far below the standards expected f
pos_text: Platinum Palace Boutique Hotel & SPA is a very elegant and well-maintained hotel, with spacious rooms and a pleasant atmosphere. The location is also convenient, allowing easy access to the city center within a few minutes. The SPA is definitely a valuable addition for guests looking to relax.
neg_text:
Unfortunately, the experience was affected by several issues that I did not expect from a hotel of this standard. The staff did not seem adequately trained for a 5-star hotel and, at times, appeared not prepared to manage a luxury property. My room was not cleaned properly during the stay, it was left untidy, and I felt poorly treated when I reported the issue.

I appreciated that the management eventually agreed to a partial refund through Booking.com, but I still believe the compensation was not fully proportionate to the inconvenience experienced. Overall, the hotel has excellent potential thanks to the structure and facilities, but the level of service and guest care needs significant improvement to truly meet 5-star expectations.

title: Very good
pos_text: The hotel building is a factory owner's villa built in 1906 and is in impeccable condition. Breakfast and dinner were first-class. The outdoor area is well maintained. A large park is located directly adjacent to it.
neg_text: The hotel consists of a main building (historic) and a modern extension. It was not apparent to us during the booking process that the windows of the rooms in the booked category could not be opened. Upon our arrival, we found the room to have an unpleasant smell and to be slightly damp. We then changed rooms and had one with two skylights that could be opened. Since there is a large tram depot directly opposite the hotel, it was correspondingly very noisy throughout the night.

title: Refined, slightly dated luxury at a very good price/Performance ratio.
pos_text: A slightly dated luxury hotel. Still impressed by the overall package. Very nice spa, also open later in the evenings. Very good breakfast, wonderfully located on the edge of the park, but a bit away from the city center, but usually with ample parking available. Very good price/Performance ratio. Visitors who express negative opinions in the reviews here often overlook the fact that in Western Europe, the standard offered doesn't even warrant 3 stars.
neg_text: Here and there you can see that the hotel has been in operation for 13 years; some minor things in the rooms need to be done.

title: Great location. Unfortunately, only Ukrainian staff are available. Cash prices are very expensive.Excellent value for money. Parking €20 per day.
pos_text: Spa areas
neg_text: Staff. Not on site. Back door closed, no key, no response. Otherwise, great.

title: Wonderful and luxurious
pos_text: Breakfast, room and spa
neg_text: Few parking spaces

title: High service, beautiful rooms, good restaurant, own SPA, good staff.
pos_text: Everything
neg_text: There is no such thing.

title: Great hotel in Wrocław
pos_text:
Great location next to a city park, large spacious rooms with a nice balcony and deck chairs.
Excellent breakfast and ambitious cuisine!
neg_text: The parking fee is 80 Zloty/day!

title: Fantastic stay!
pos_text: Delicious breakfasts, comfortable bed, plenty of amenities in the room.
neg_text: The mirror in the bathroom is poorly constructed, the blind in the bathroom is poorly placed. Apart from that, great!

title: Wrocław is a big city.
pos_text: Good tram access to the hotel. Nice surroundings - the hotel is located on the edge of the park. A beautiful historic building with a second building added on the park side. The service was very nice. The room is decorated in a very modern way - you can see that someone thought about it to make it super modern. Breakfast was very good and varied.

title: Have a nice stay
pos_text: Very nice interior, very nice staff. Very good cuisine, including breakfasts, with scrambled eggs made from real eggs (not powdered) and a good selection of cold meats, cheeses and other additions. The room was clean and spacious, although ours in the attic had sloping ceilings - nevertheless the area was large enough. Spacious bathroom. A really good hotel.
neg_text: A minor issue: at breakfast, the hot water kettle ran out of water, which could also have been taken from the coffee machine, but it would have been nice to have a nice note on the samovar with the information to use the coffee machine if there was no water. The second thing is loud parties on some Fridays and Saturdays, but I understand that the hotel makes good money from such events. Nevertheless, it is a minor inconvenience. Oh, and there's also the inconvenient and unintuitive hot water on/off switch for the shower/rain shower.

title: A pleasant getaway
pos_text: Bright and well-kept spaces

title: We recommend
pos_text:
Very nice and professional service.
The hotel's decor and atmosphere do the trick. Access to the relaxation area. Great!
neg_text: Access to parking, or even lack thereof. We happened to be there for a family party and despite the extra fee (quite a bit much per night) As hotel guests, we had to fight for a place.

title: The stay was very successful, comfortable room, great service and pleasant atmosphere
pos_text: A very enjoyable stay, beautiful, stylish interiors, clean and comfortable room and great breakfasts. A big plus for the SPA zone and friendly, professional service. The perfect place for a relaxing trip.
neg_text: I have no major complaints, the stay was very successful

title: Old equipment - not a spa hotel
pos_text: The place is nice - next to a park and very friendly staff. Especially the experienced gentleman at the entrance who helps you with navigation.
neg_text:
I stayed in the king suite yet unfortunately the room was not in good shape. I have a video that the ceiling is dripping when you take a shower. The soap dispenser was not working properly and many things had damages. Again, for king suite I would expect a bit better quality - not that those things ruin everything. You can still have a nice sleep but for a king suite, I think it can be fixed a bit more often as it shows how much you care for your best experience.

For a hotel that has SPA in it, firstly it is tiny. Secondly, everyone was wearing swimming suit in the sauna and when I asked the super nice staff, they said - people are shy we started allowing - I think a hygiene issue should not be handled this way. Especially for a “spa hotel”

title: Bad
pos_text: I advise against it... it seems nice, but they charge a 200 PLN deposit which they don't return, so add 200 PLN to the price and an additional 80 PLN for parking

title: We would choose this hotel again on our next visit to Wrocław!
pos_text: Very quiet, a bit outside the city but with excellent public transport connections. Good and tasty breakfast buffet with a good selection. Very comfortable and quiet, with a cozy spa area.
neg_text: The only thing we noticed was that the windows in the room couldn't be tilted open. The rest was excellent.

title: Disappointing
pos_text: The hotel is amazing in every respect. Is it a historic part or a new one? "Restaurant" service at a high level. It would have been 9 stars, but due to the situation that occurred, the incompetent reception staff gave it a forced "4".
neg_text:
Another visit to this hotel and another unpleasant situation with incompetent reception staff. A deposit is charged which the lady at the reception simply forgot about. Despite asking twice, the woman simply acted as if she was in another world and did not know what was being said to her. When the deposit was finally returned, it seems to me that the room where my personal belongings were left, including my work phone, should have been checked first.
Shameful behavior for a 5-star hotel that no one informed me about finding it, as it turned out 10 minutes after my check-out that the phone had been left at the hotel so I could come back for it. Only late in the evening, when I was home, did I notice that I did not have my phone. I called the staff and asked if it had been found and that due to the incident with another guest, they simply "forgot to inform me". How can a hotel of this caliber and with accolades everywhere allow such situations to occur in 2026? Every visit there is the same problem with the young people at the reception. Does anyone managing the facility know about this?

title: Time well spent.
pos_text: The staff is top-notch.

title: Very good hotel, well connected, divided into an older and a modern part.
pos_text: Very good breakfast, very nice service, I got extra juice!
neg_text: tight, slightly poorly organized parking lot.

title: Nevertheless, a very pleasant stay!
pos_text: Breakfast and staff great!
neg_text:
Floor-to-ceiling windows that cannot be opened.
Fitness equipment in the wellness area = much too warm. Not well thought out. Exercise bike defective.
No cool relaxation room and no fresh air outlet in the wellness area

title: 5 stars in real life
pos_text: A very elegant and comfortable hotel. Large, well-equipped room. Excellent breakfast.

title: Beautiful structure
pos_text:
The room, a junior suite with a glass window and a view of the park.
Super spacious, gorgeous bathroom. Breakfast
neg_text: The heating in the room wasn't working. It was too cold. Terrible pillows. Gym room with 3 machines and no space.

title: There is a lot to improve, which is a pity because the hotel is beautiful.
pos_text: Historic building
neg_text: Room not as booked. After reporting that we had booked another room with a large double bed, the gentleman at the reception said that the hotel was fully booked and there was nothing he could do. He also recommended that we could move the furniture ourselves and then we would have a double bed. Breakfast also leaves much to be desired. A coffee machine that kept breaking down. We were sitting right next to it and while eating breakfast the error message appeared several times. The employee tried to save the situation by "scooping up coffee beans with a spoon" every now and then. The breakfast room service was sluggish, the tables were not cleaned, the food selection and quality were, let's say, satisfactory. Nothing more.

title: Stunning hotel, great spa facilities, but poor breakfast for someone with allergies.
pos_text: Stunning architecture and very quiet room. The addition of a spa was great. The rooms were very clean, and the beds were extremely comfortable. I really appreciate being helped with our luggage to the room.
neg_text:
The windows did not open in our room, so we had to rely on the air conditioning which didn’t work very well.
The breakfast was very disappointing, as the hotel was not able to cater for my allergies. I had informed them in advance, but they were not prepared. We waited a long time at breakfast for just a bowl of porridge which is what they were able to make for me. The staff did their best to help, but I think there was poor communication from the beginning. I suffered an allergic reaction on my final meal, even after speaking with the manager about my allergies.

title: I recommend it, but before signing the consent for the procedure it is worth making sure that they apply the promised discount for the procedures.
pos_text: Nice room, jacuzzi available.
neg_text: Unfortunately, despite information about a 10% discount on spa treatments for hotel guests, I did not receive it.

title: Not a 5* hotel
pos_text: Very good breakfast and delicious food in the attached restaurant.
neg_text:
The safe was defective, and this was reported on the very first day. Nobody took care of it until we left.
There are only 2 hooks for bathrobes in the bathroom. There are no other hooks for drying towels. There is ample space available and the effort is minimal, with a great effect. The bathroom mirror stood in the window facing the main street and in the window frame. Soap dispensers and lotion dispensers were attached. Apart from the fact that it's all very impractical, you stand directly in front of the window at the washbasin. There is a roller blind intended to prevent people from seeing inside, but this then prevents them from seeing in the mirror.
There are also no hooks for hanging jackets, bags, etc. in the entire room.
Unfortunately, the room was not properly cleaned.
We tested the spa area. Here too, we must say that everything is cramped and there is no separate quiet zone.
The booked massage, however, was very good.
The staff were generally helpful, but often seemed awkward.
Overall, we have to say that the hotel does not have a 5-star level.

title: Great short break
pos_text: The breakfast was very plentiful and delicious. The food at the restaurant was great. The wellness area and massage services left nothing to be desired.
neg_text:
The room was large, but there was no way to store clothes for four days in the wardrobe. The bedside tables were just for show. There were no hooks for the outdoor clothing. The spacious room had two hooks for bathrobes. No towels were available. You should consult the interior designer again.
20€ for the car The parking space fee is a gross exaggeration, not to mention a rip-off.

title: I guess for once
pos_text: It's hard to say
neg_text: Heavy style

title: Romantic getaway
pos_text: Nice room, very good breakfast, very good food from the restaurant in the room service option, relaxing jacuzzi and sauna area (in the morning before more guests arrive)
neg_text: Evening SPA (jacuzzi and saunas) it can be overcrowded, maybe it would be worth considering introducing reservations for the jacuzzi and saunas, so that guests are not disappointed with a complete lack of space after entering the jacuzzi and sauna area

title: Pleasant
pos_text: The architecture
neg_text: A bit dated.

title: Relaxing stay
pos_text: Great location, very friendly staff as always

title: A very nice place at an affordable price for a 5-star hotel
pos_text: Location and hotel facility
neg_text: There was no such thing

title: Passable
neg_text:
I booked accommodation for two days with SPA services. On the day of departure, I was informed that the SPA would be closed the following day.
After canceling the reservation, I was refunded 50% of the price.
This kind of behavior doesn't seem professional to me, František.

title: Good for one night
pos_text:
I have stayed at this hotel several times. So there were no big surprises,
Extensive breakfast with the option to order special dishes. The menu in the restaurant is not too extensive,
But there are some interesting dishes. Everything was very tasty. The staff were very friendly.
neg_text: There are two areas for the rooms - mine was in an outdoor area where two different elevators had to be used, the room was quite small (I've had larger ones on my first trips) - and unfortunately cold. Unfortunately, there was no prior indication of this, for example in a welcome letter or at check-in. Comfortable second cushions for leaning against, a notepad and pen were also missing; in fact, a welcome folder, perhaps with some tips about the city, was completely absent.
